tasks.title: Identify all usages of the chat icon in the codebase
tasks.description: Search the codebase for all references to the current chat icon usage, including imports, JSX elements, and icon references in components and services. Document the file paths and lines where the chat icon is used.
acceptanceCriteria: All files and locations where the chat icon is used are identified and listed
tasks.expectedResult: A list of all files and code locations referencing the chat icon is produced

outputPlan.description: JSON file listing all chat icon usages in the codebase

evidence: chat_icon_usages.json file exists and contains data
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a comprehensive list of all chat icon usages for targeted update

tasks.title: Replace old chat icon with new chat icon in src/components/aiTutor/ModeSelector.tsx
tasks.description: Modify src/components/aiTutor/ModeSelector.tsx to replace the existing chat icon (e.g., emoji or SVG) with the new chat icon as specified. Update the icon property in the relevant ModeOption object(s) that represent chat functionality. Ensure the icon is consistent with the new design.
acceptanceCriteria: The chat icon in ModeSelector.tsx is replaced with the new icon
Visual verification of the new icon in the UI
tasks.expectedResult: src/components/aiTutor/ModeSelector.tsx uses the new chat icon instead of the old one

outputPlan.description: Updated chat icon in ModeSelector component

metadata.inputContext: List of chat icon usages, new chat icon design or asset
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Updates the chat icon in the ModeSelector UI component

tasks.title: Replace old chat icon with new chat icon in src/services/ChatContext.ts
tasks.description: Modify src/services/ChatContext.ts to update any references to the chat icon string or component to use the new chat icon. This includes any icon properties in ContextAwareQuickAction or other relevant objects related to chat functionality.
acceptanceCriteria: All chat icon references in ChatContext.ts are updated to the new icon
The service compiles and functions correctly
tasks.expectedResult: src/services/ChatContext.ts uses the new chat icon in all relevant places

outputPlan.description: Updated chat icon references in ChatContext service

metadata.inputContext: List of chat icon usages, new chat icon design or asset
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Updates the chat icon in the ChatContext service

tasks.title: Run tests and validate chat icon updates
tasks.description: Run the full test suite to ensure that replacing the chat icon did not break any functionality or UI components. Validate visually if possible that the new chat icon appears correctly in the application UI.
acceptanceCriteria: No regressions in chat-related UI or functionality
tasks.expectedResult: Test suite passes confirming the chat icon update is safe

metadata.inputContext: Code changes from chat icon replacement tasks
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures the chat icon update does not break the application
